settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.autoLaunchDesc: Application will run automatically when system starts
settings.keepAwakeDesc: Prevent system from sleeping while playing music
settings.showLyricsDesc: Display synchronized lyrics on main interface
settings.enableMediaKeysDesc: Allow using keyboard media keys to control playback
settings.appDesc: Cross-platform desktop music player built with Wails v3 + Vue 3
settings.languageChangedTip: Language changed. Some interfaces require app restart to take full effect.
